function.name: agents.Hire
function.description: Hire a contractor agent with a task prompt inside a sandbox.

name.description: Agent's unique name, leave empty to auto-generate a name

sandbox.description: Relative path to the folder, leave empty to use the same sandbox

prompt.description: Specific task instructions, agent will quit with a report after completion

function.name: agents.Fire
function.description: Fire a contractor agent with a unique name.

function.name: agents.Inquire
function.description: Inquire a status report of the contractor agent with a unique name.

function.name: agents.Quit
function.description: Finish your own work with a work report to the hiring agent.

message.description: The work report. If it contains "my work is done" the current process exits with a success.
